  Thanks for the PR. Please fill in the sections below.
  If this is a security-sensitive change, also link the related advisory.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing usage to break)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / CI / tooling

## Linked issues / advisories

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, refs GHSA-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`, …).
- [ ] I added or updated tests that demonstrate the change.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes locally.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under an `Unreleased` heading (or noted that this PR does not need a changelog entry).
- [ ] If this PR touches the public API, I updated `README.md`.
- [ ] If this PR touches money math, transaction building, or the TON Connect mapping, I noted the implications in the description above.
